name: viberglass-monorepo
description: Viberglass monorepo - AI Agent Orchestrator and Platform
author: Viberglass Contributors

scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe "npm run dev -w @viberglass/platform-backend" "npm run dev -w @viberglass/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @viberglass/types && npm run build -w @viberglass/agent-core && npm run build -w @viberglass/platform-ui && npm run build -w @viberglass/integration-core && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build:worker: npm run build -w @viberglass/types && npm run build -w @viberglass/agent-core && npm run build -w @viberglass/agent-claude-code -w @viberglass/agent-codex -w @viberglass/agent-gemini -w @viberglass/agent-kimi -w @viberglass/agent-mistral-vibe -w @viberglass/agent-opencode -w @viberglass/agent-pi -w @viberglass/agent-qwen && npm run build -w @viberator/orchestrator
scripts.platform:dev: concurrently -n be,fe "npm run dev -w @viberglass/platform-backend" "npm run dev -w @viberglass/frontend"
scripts.platform:build: concurrently -n be,fe "npm run build -w @viberglass/platform-backend" "npm run build -w @viberglass/frontend"
scripts.platform:start: concurrently -n be,fe "npm run start -w @viberglass/platform-backend" "npm run start -w @viberglass/frontend"
